history.content:
<thought>
The agent is facing north at the bottom row. The goal G is two rows ahead and two columns to the right, but a wall blocks direct north path after two steps. There is lava at (5,4) and (5,5) which are to the right of the agent's path. The immediate forward cell (5,3) is a safe floor. Moving forward is a safe step to approach the goal. I will move forward first.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The goal G is located one row above me and two columns to the right (at row6, col6). The cell directly in front of me (north) is a floor tile, so I can move forward safely. The cells to my right are lava, so I should not turn right now. I will move forward to get closer to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The goal G is two cells to the right of my position. Directly ahead is a wall, so I need to turn right to face east. Then I can move forward onto the floor cell and then again to reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The agent is facing north. The cell directly ahead is floor, and two cells ahead is the goal. Moving forward is safe and will bring me closer to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The goal G is directly in front of me (one cell ahead). The cell in front is a goal cell, not lava or wall. Moving forward will reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
